title: universal-spawn Claude platform extension
description: Strict JSON Schema for the `platforms.claude` object in a universal-spawn manifest v1.0.0.

skill_type.description: How this creation presents itself to Claude.

skill_file.description: Relative path to the Skill definition file (YAML) when skill_type is 'skill'.

model.description: Recommended Claude model id for this creation.

surface.description: Which Claude surfaces are allowed to spawn this creation. At least one required.

tools.description: Tool definitions to expose via the Messages API.

function_ref.description: Relative path to a JSON file that provides {name, description, input_schema}.

mcp_server.description: How to launch this creation as an MCP server.

ref.description: Relative path or URL for the chosen transport.

system_prompt_file.description: Relative path to a file whose contents are sent as the system prompt.

prompt_cache.description: If true, the consumer SHOULD enable prompt caching for recurring context.
